title: pelargonium divaricatum
intro: Pelargonium divaricatum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Mountain Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Pelargonium divaricatum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, soothe respiratory problems, and reduce stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
